info.title: Limitless Exchange API
info.description: Production-ready REST API for prediction market trading, portfolio management, and market data on Limitless Exchange (Base L2).

tags.name: Markets
tags.description: Browse, search, and analyze prediction markets

tags.name: Market Navigation
tags.description: Navigation tree, market pages, and property filters

tags.name: Portfolio
tags.description: Position tracking, trade history, and performance

get.description: Returns a signing message with a randomly generated nonce for authentication purposes.

200.description: A signing message containing a nonce has been successfully generated

schema.example:
Welcome to Limitless.exchange! Please sign this message to verify your identity.

Nonce: 0xa1b2c3d4e5f67890...

get.description: Verifies if the user is authenticated

post.description: Deprecated. Cookie-based session login has been removed. Use API keys instead.

410.description: Cookie-based session login has been removed. Use API keys instead.

200.description: User has been successfully logged out

post.description: Creates a new API key for programmatic access. Only available for users authenticated via the UI (Privy). Previous active keys are automatically revoked.

keyId.description: Unique identifier for the API key

apiKey.description: The API key value. Only shown once at creation time.

403.description: API key management is only available via the UI

get.description: Returns the currently active API key metadata for the authenticated user. Does not return the key value itself.

200.description: Active API key metadata, or null if no active key exists

keyId.description: Unique identifier for the API key

lastUsedAt.description: When the key was last used

delete.description: Revokes the currently active API key. The key will immediately stop working for authentication.

403.description: API key management is only available via the UI

get.description: Retrieves markets and groups that are active and not yet resolved, with optional category filtering

parameters.name: tradeType
parameters.description: Filter by trade type (amm, clob, or group)

parameters.name: automationType
parameters.description: Filter by automation type (manual, lumy, or sports)

200.description: Active markets and groups with volume and liquidity data

500.description: Server error when retrieving markets data

get.description: Retrieves markets and groups that are active and not yet resolved, with optional category filtering

parameters.name: tradeType
parameters.description: Filter by trade type (amm, clob, or group)

parameters.name: automationType
parameters.description: Filter by automation type (manual, lumy, or sports)

200.description: Active markets and groups with volume and liquidity data

500.description: Server error when retrieving markets data

get.description: Returns the number of active markets for each category and the total market count

200.description: Object containing category counts and total count

500.description: Server error when retrieving category count data

get.summary: Get active market count per category

get.description: Retrieves slugs, strike prices, tickers, and deadlines for all active markets and groups. Group markets are nested under their parent group.

200.description: List of active market and group slugs with metadata

500.description: Server error when retrieving market slugs

get.summary: Get active market slugs with metadata

get.description: Retrieves market or group data using either an Ethereum address or a slug identifier

200.description: Market or group details with pricing and volume data

oneOf.description: CLOB market with position IDs and trading data
NegRisk group with nested markets array
AMM market with liquidity and volume data

500.description: Server error when retrieving market/group data

get.description: Returns Chainlink candlestick data for markets configured with Chainlink Data Streams chart metadata. Useful for charting the underlying oracle price alongside prediction market prices.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Start timestamp in UNIX seconds. Defaults to market creation time minus 15 minutes.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: End timestamp in UNIX seconds. Defaults to now.

200.description: Candlestick data for the underlying oracle

timestampStart.description: Start of the data range (UNIX seconds)

timestampEnd.description: End of the data range (UNIX seconds)

400.description: Invalid interval, time range, or market does not have Chainlink oracle configured

502.description: Failed to fetch data from Chainlink

get.description: Retrieves the latest feed events related to a specific market with pagination support

200.description: List of feed events for the market

500.description: Server error when retrieving feed events

get.summary: Get feed events for a market

get.description: Retrieve historical price data for a specific market with configurable time intervals
Retrieve the current orderbook for a market showing all open buy and sell orders

200.description: Current orderbook with bids and asks

400.description: Market does not support orderbook (AMM market)

get.description: Get the amount of funds locked in open orders for the authenticated user
Get all orders placed by the authenticated user for a specific market

parameters.name: statuses
parameters.description: Order status(es) to filter by. Defaults to [LIVE] if not provided

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of orders to return

200.description: List of user orders for the market

get.description: Get recent events for a specific market including trades, orders, and liquidity changes

schema.example: Sports betting markets with high odds

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of results to return

200.description: Returns markets matching the search query

get.summary: Search for markets based on semantic similarity

get.description: Retrieve all AMM trades executed by the authenticated user

200.description: List of user trades with details

get.description: Retrieve all active positions with P&L calculations and market values
Hybrid PnL: realised series + current total snapshot

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: Timeframe window for percent change and chart series

get.description: Paginated history including AMM, CLOB trades, splits/merges, NegRisk conversions

200.description: Paginated history of all user actions

get.description: Get total traded volume for a specific user. Returns combined CLOB and AMM volume (both taker and maker sides) in whole USDC. This is the all-time cumulative trading volume, not the current portfolio value.

data.description: Total traded volume in whole USDC (no decimal divisor needed). Includes both taker and maker volume across CLOB and AMM trades.

get.description: Retrieve all positions for a specific user address
Hybrid PnL: realised series + current total snapshot

parameters.name: timeframe
parameters.description: Timeframe window for percent change and chart series

get.description: Check USDC allowance for CLOB or NegRisk trading contracts

parameters.name: spender
parameters.description: Optional spender address override (e.g., venue exchange address)

get.description: Returns the hierarchical navigation structure for market pages
Resolves a URL path to a market page with its configuration, filters, and breadcrumb

301.description: Path has been redirected to a new location

get.description: Returns paginated list of markets for a specific market page with filtering and sorting

parameters.name: cursor
parameters.description: Cursor token for cursor-based pagination (cannot be used with page)

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sort field with optional - prefix for descending (e.g., -updatedAt, createdAt, deadline)

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Page number for offset pagination (cannot be used with cursor)

400.description: Invalid parameters or pagination mode conflict

get.description: Returns all property keys with their options, sorted by slug
Returns a specific property key with its options
Returns options for a specific property key, optionally filtered by parent option

parameters.name: parentId
parameters.description: Parent option ID for hierarchical filtering

post.description: Creates a buy/sell order for prediction market positions. Requires signed order data.

requestBody.description: Order creation data including signature and order parameters

400.description: Invalid order data, insufficient balance/allowance, or market deadline passed

post.description: Fetches historical order statuses for multiple orders by internal order IDs and/or client-provided order IDs. Returns execution details, settlement status, and maker match data for each order.

delete.description: Cancel an open order and return locked funds

parameters.name: orderId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the order to be cancelled

401.description: User not authenticated or not the order owner

207.description: Partial success - some orders cancelled, some failed

400.description: Orders from different markets, invalid order data, or no orders could be cancelled

401.description: User not authenticated or not the owner of all orders

207.description: Partial success - some orders cancelled, some failed

400.description: Invalid market slug or no orders could be cancelled

delete.summary: Cancel all of a user's orders in a specific market

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile, including their internal user ID and fee rate. This is useful for API users who need their `feeRateBps` (for order signing) or numeric `id` (used as `ownerId` in other flows). You can only access your own profile — requesting another user's address returns 403.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Your wallet address (the address associated with your API key)

200.description: User profile with fee rate and rank information

401.description: Unauthorized — missing or invalid API key

403.description: Forbidden — cannot access another user's private profile. Use the public profile endpoint instead.

404.description: Profile not found for the given address

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: API key for programmatic access. Generate at limitless.exchange -> profile menu -> Api keys.

HmacAuth.name: lmts-api-key
HmacAuth.description: Scoped API token with HMAC-SHA256 signing. Requires three headers: lmts-api-key (token ID), lmts-timestamp (ISO-8601), lmts-signature (Base64-encoded HMAC). See Authentication docs for details.

ProfileResponse.description: User profile including trading rank and fee rate

id.description: Internal user ID (used as ownerId in other API flows)

displayName.description: Display name shown in the UI

isCreator.description: Whether the user is a market creator

isOnboarded.description: Whether the user has completed onboarding

socialUrl.description: URL to the user's social media profile

hasTraded.description: Whether the user has executed at least one trade

tradeWalletOption.description: Which wallet is used for trading

tradeWalletChoosen.description: Whether the user has selected a trade wallet

rank.description: User's trading rank, which determines the fee rate applied to orders

feeRateBps.description: Fee rate in basis points applied to this user's orders. Use this value when constructing signed orders.

referredProfileId.description: Profile ID of the referred user

pfpUrl.description: Profile picture of the referred user

displayName.description: Display name of the referred user

enrolledInPointsProgram.description: Whether the user is enrolled in the points program

isTop100.description: Whether the user is in the top 100 on the leaderboard

isCaptain.description: Whether the user is a competition team captain

smartWallet.description: Smart wallet address (required for Smart Wallet client)

r.description: Referral code associated with the user who referred (invited) this user

data.description: Array of active markets with complete trading data including volume, liquidity, and recent feed events

example.title: $DOGE above $0.21652 on Sep 1, 12:00 UTC?
example.description: This market will resolve to "YES" if the price of $DOGE is above $0.21652...

items.description: Market object with complete trading data (FEMarket type)

totalMarketsCount.description: Total number of active markets available for pagination

category.description: Number of active markets per category

data.description: Array of feed events with pagination (FEFeedEvents type)

userRewards.description: User rewards for this timestamp in token decimals

totalRewards.description: Total rewards for this timestamp in token decimals
Total rewards distributed in this epoch in token decimals

userRewards.description: User rewards earned in this epoch in token decimals

earnedPercent.description: Part of total rewards earned by the user - [0; 1]

todaysRewards.description: Rewards earned today in token decimals

totalUnpaidRewards.description: Total unpaid rewards in token decimals

totalUserRewardsLastEpoch.description: Total user rewards from the last epoch in token decimals

rewardsChartData.description: Chart data showing rewards over time

collateralAmount.description: Amount of collateral invested in token decimals

latestTrade.description: Latest trade associated with this position

outcomeTokenAmount.description: Amount of outcome tokens held in token decimals

account.description: Wallet address that was used to create this position

address.description: The address of the FixedProductMarketMaker contract.

title.description: Represents the question of the market, the title metadata of the market.

question_id.description: The bytes32 parsed title of the market.

condition_id.description: The bytes32 conditionId of the market, representing the conditions defined on condition preparation.

outcome_slot_count.description: The number of outcomes in the market.

winning_index.description: The outcome index that was reported by the oracle.

payout_numerators.description: The oracle payout numerators that the oracle reported.

status.description: Indicates the status of the market.

og_url.description: The URL of the market OG image for SEO.

image_url.description: The URL of the market logo image for SEO.

cost.description: Cost basis of the position in token decimals (e.g. 1 USDC = 1000000)

fillPrice.description: Average fill price of the position (price per share in token decimals)

realisedPnl.description: Realized profit/loss from closed positions in token decimals

unrealizedPnl.description: Unrealized profit/loss based on current market price in token decimals

marketValue.description: Current market value of the position in token decimals

HistoryTradeDto.description: An AMM trade executed by the user

blockTimestamp.description: Timestamp of the block containing the trade

outcomeIndex.description: Index of the outcome traded (0 = YES, 1 = NO)

outcomeTokenNetCost.description: Net cost of the outcome tokens

outcomeTokenPrice.description: Price of the outcome token at trade time

timeframe.description: Timeframe window used for previous/current comparison

data.description: Realised PnL series (USD) for the selected timeframe

previousValue.description: Previous realised PnL (USD) at timeframe start

percentChange.description: Percent change between previousValue and currentValue (realised PnL)

current.description: Current PnL snapshot (hybrid: realised + unrealized + total)

negRiskMarketId.description: Onchain NegRisk market ID as identified by the NegriskAdapter smart-contract

blockTimestamp.description: Block timestamp of the operation (unix seconds)

collateralAmount.description: Collateral amount involved (human-readable, after dividing by token decimals)

outcomeTokenAmounts.description: Amounts of outcome tokens for each outcome [YES, NO]

outcomeIndex.description: Index of the outcome (0 = YES, 1 = NO)

outcomeTokenPrice.description: Effective price per outcome token for this fill

strategy.description: Type of operation. `Buy`/`Sell` = AMM trades, `Limit Buy`/`Limit Sell` = CLOB maker fills, `Market Buy`/`Market Sell` = CLOB taker fills, `Split`/`Merge` = position split/merge, `Convert` = NegRisk conversion, `Claim` = winnings redemption.

transactionHash.description: On-chain transaction hash (present for settled trades, splits, merges, conversions, and claims)

id.description: Unique identifier for the navigation node

name.description: Display name of the navigation item

slug.description: URL slug for the navigation item

path.description: Full path to this navigation item

icon.description: Icon identifier for the navigation item

metadata.description: Optional metadata for the option (color, icon)

name.description: Display name of the filter group

slug.description: URL slug for the filter group

allowMultiple.description: Whether multiple options can be selected

presentation.description: Presentation style for the filter group

name.description: Display name of the breadcrumb item

slug.description: URL slug of the breadcrumb item

path.description: Full path to this breadcrumb item

id.description: Unique identifier of the market page

name.description: Display name of the market page

slug.description: URL slug of the market page

fullPath.description: Full URL path to this market page

baseFilter.description: Base filter configuration for the page

filterGroups.description: Available filter groups for the page

nextCursor.description: Cursor for the next page of results

cursor.description: Cursor pagination info (when using cursor parameter)

pagination.description: Offset pagination info (when using page parameter)

id.description: Unique identifier of the property option

propertyKeyId.description: Property key ID this option belongs to

parentOptionId.description: Parent option ID for hierarchical options

id.description: Unique identifier of the property key

name.description: Display name of the property key

slug.description: URL slug of the property key

metadata.description: Additional metadata for the property key

isSystem.description: Whether this is a system-defined property key

options.description: Available options for this property key

salt.description: Unique random value for signature uniqueness (prevents replay attacks)

maker.description: Ethereum address of the maker (order creator)

taker.description: Specific taker address (optional for open orders)

tokenId.description: Token ID being traded (YES or NO position ID from conditional token)

makerAmount.description: Amount the maker is offering (in wei, 18 decimals)

takerAmount.description: Amount the maker wants in return (in wei, 18 decimals)

price.description: Order price as decimal (0.01-0.99, required for GTC orders)

signature.description: EIP-712 signature of order details. Optional when using delegated signing.

signatureType.description: Signature type (0-3). Optional when using delegated signing.

order.description: Order details including signature and amounts

ownerId.description: Profile ID of the order owner

orderType.description: Order type (GTC=Good Till Cancelled, FOK=Fill Or Kill)

clientOrderId.description: Client-provided idempotency key for order placement. If a duplicate is submitted, the server returns 409 Conflict.

onBehalfOf.description: Profile ID to place order on behalf of (partner flow). Requires an API token with trading scope and a partner relationship with the target profile.

OrderExecutionTotalsRawDto.description: Raw execution totals in contract units (strings to preserve precision)

OrderExecutionDto.description: Execution and settlement summary for a created order

matched.description: Whether the order was matched immediately

settlementStatus.description: Current settlement status of the order

feeRateBps.description: Fee rate in basis points applied to this order

effectiveFeeBps.description: Effective fee rate in basis points after any rebates

order.description: Order details including slim market and owner

makerMatches.description: Maker matches if order was matched immediately

message.description: Confirmation message for the cancelled order

orderIds.description: Array of order IDs to be cancelled in a single batch operation

orderId.description: Order ID that failed to cancel

reason.description: Error code indicating the reason for failure

message.example: Order not found or already canceled

message.description: Confirmation message for the cancelled orders

canceled.description: Array of successfully cancelled order IDs

failed.description: Array of orders that failed to cancel with reasons

message.description: Confirmation message for cancelling all orders

canceled.description: Array of successfully cancelled order IDs

failed.description: Array of orders that failed to cancel with reasons

orderId.description: Internal order ID. Provide either orderId or clientOrderId, not both.

clientOrderId.description: Client-provided order ID. Provide either orderId or clientOrderId, not both.

items.description: List of status lookup queries (1-50 items)

clientOrderId.description: Client-provided order ID if one was set

matched.description: Whether the order was matched with a counterparty

totalsRaw.description: Raw execution totals as strings (to preserve precision)

index.description: Index of this item in the request array

error.example: Exactly one of orderId or clientOrderId is required

makerMatches.description: Maker orders matched against this order

results.description: Array of status results corresponding to request items
